hero.purpose: Landing-page H1 only. 'Predict every match' headline.

display.purpose: Landing section H2s, profile stat displays.

title.purpose: Card titles, group titles, How-it-works step headings.

card.purpose: Phone-screen card headings, dashboard section headings.

body-lg.purpose: Hero subtitle, calm second voice under a big headline.

body.purpose: Default paragraph. Cap at 65–75ch on landing.

meta.purpose: Nav links, meta info, secondary card text.

label.purpose: Uppercase eyebrow labels (SIMPLE BY DESIGN, UPCOMING).

chip.purpose: Inside chip components and status badges.

scoreboard.purpose: Every number that changes during a match — scores, points, ranks, timers, countdowns. The Mono-For-Numbers Rule.

shadows.name: glass
shadows.purpose: Default elevation for every glass panel. Inset highlight is non-negotiable.

shadows.name: glow-mint
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA at rest and on hover; 'you' highlight on leaderboard.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Default easing for all state transitions; exponential ease-out.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Hover snaps, button-press feedback, page transitions.

motion.name: duration-normal
motion.purpose: State changes, modal entrances, FAQ accordion.

motion.name: live-pulse
motion.purpose: Live indicator dot, LIVE chip on match cards.

motion.name: score-flip
motion.purpose: Score digit flip when a result updates.

components.name: Primary CTA
components.description: Mint→cyan gradient pill with navy ink and neon glow. Reserved for the strongest action on any screen.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary">LET'S PLAY <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M5 12h14M13 6l6 6-6 6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; height: 44px; padding: 0 28px; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #00FF88, #00D4FF); color: #0B141B; font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; border: none; border-radius: 100px; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0,255,136,0.35), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,255,136,0.2); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), filter 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); filter: brightness(1.05); box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0,255,136,0.5), 0 6px 22px rgba(0,255,136,0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00FF88; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Glass-surface secondary action. Used for 'I have a passkey', 'Cancel', alternate funnel paths.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 44px; padding: 0 20px; background: rgba(18, 14, 38, 0.5); color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); border-radius: 18px; cursor: pointer; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); transition: transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: rgba(18, 14, 38, 0.7); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: scale(0.97); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #00D4FF; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Mint Chip
components.description: Status pill for win, saved, you. Tinted glass with thin border and optional glow.
components.html: SAVED
components.css: .ds-chip-mint { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 4px 10px; background: rgba(0,255,136,0.09); color: #00FF88; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.22); border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-chip-mint svg { width: 11px; height: 11px; }

components.name: Cyan Live Chip
components.description: Live-state chip with a pulsing dot. Used wherever a match is currently in play.
components.css: .ds-chip-cyan { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 10px; background: rgba(0,212,255,0.09); color: #00D4FF; border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.22); border-radius: 100px; font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; backdrop-filter: blur(8px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(8px); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-live-dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #00D4FF; animation: dsLivePulse 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes dsLivePulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1.3); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-live-dot { animation: none; } }

components.name: Glass Card
components.description: Default elevated surface for product screens. Purple-tinted glass with inset top highlight.
components.html:
YOUR RANK
#3
of 7 · Tech Titans
components.css: .ds-glass-card { display: inline-block; padding: 24px; background: rgba(18, 14, 38, 0.32); backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(180%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(40px) saturate(180%); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); border-radius: 22px; box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,0.4), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18); min-width: 200px; } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #00D4FF; margin-bottom: 8px; } .ds-card-stat { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 900; color: #00FF88; line-height: 1; } .ds-card-meta { margin-top: 4px; font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.5); }

components.name: Score Cell Pair
components.description: Two 32×32 mint-tinted squares with mono digits, separated by em-dash. The pick-entry primitive.
components.css: .ds-score-row { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-score-cell { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; background: rgba(0,255,136,0.08); color: #00FF88; border: 1px solid rgba(0,255,136,0.3); border-radius: 8px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-score-cell:hover { background: rgba(0,255,136,0.15); border-color: rgba(0,255,136,0.5); } .ds-score-sep { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 14px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Standard glass input — signup, group name, magic-link email. 44px tall.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 280px; height: 44px; padding: 0 16px; background: rgba(18, 14, 38, 0.32); color: #ffffff; font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.14); border-radius: 14px; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: rgba(0,255,136,0.5); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(0,255,136,0.12), 0 4px 16px rgba(0,255,136,0.15); }

components.name: Bottom Nav (Active Item)
components.description: Single active item from the mobile bottom nav. Top neon bar + accent label.
components.html: HOME
components.css: .ds-nav-wrap { display: inline-block; padding: 12px 0; background: rgba(8, 12, 22, 0.85); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); width: 100px; } .ds-nav-item { position: relative; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 0; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-active { color: #00FF88; } .ds-nav-bar { position: absolute; top: -12px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); width: 28px; height: 2.5px; border-radius: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #00FF88, #00D4FF); box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(0,255,136,0.6); } .ds-nav-item svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; } .ds-nav-label { font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.1em; text-transform: uppercase; }

components.name: Live Score Bar
components.description: Signature component — the cyan-glass scoreboard strip that anchors the live-match dashboard and the chat header. Where the metaphor becomes literal.
components.html:
BR
2—1
FR
67'
components.css: .ds-score-bar { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px 18px; background: rgba(0,212,255,0.06); backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(120%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px) saturate(120%); border: 1px solid rgba(0,212,255,0.2); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(0,212,255,0.08), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.06); } .ds-live-pip { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #00D4FF; box-shadow: 0 0 8px rgba(0,212,255,0.7); animation: dsLivePulseBar 1.4s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes dsLivePulseBar { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } 50% { opacity: 0.6; transform: scale(1.3); } } .ds-flag { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; color: #fff; font-family: 'Outfit', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 9px; font-weight: 800; border: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.18); } .ds-big-score { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 900; color: #ffffff; line-height: 1; } .ds-score-dash { color: rgba(255,255,255,0.35); font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 22px; } .ds-min { margin-left: 6px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: #00D4FF; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-live-pip { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview:
Cup Clash is built like the floodlit perimeter board of a packed stadium at kickoff: deep navy-black field, illuminated glass panels floating above it, neon mint and electric cyan as the channels that light up when something happens. Big numerals are mono, not pretty — they belong on a scoreboard, not a marketing slide. Type set in Bricolage Grotesque carries the loud, almost broadcast-graphics title voice; Outfit handles the calm legible body; JetBrains Mono owns every number that changes during a match.

The system is two surfaces sharing one design language. The product app lives in the dark scoreboard. The marketing landing inverts to a light surface — same accents, same type, same component shapes, but on a pale background with #0F172A ink.

What this system explicitly rejects: the aggressive odds-board patina of sportsbooks, the cream-and-rounded sameness of generic SaaS landings, and the mascot-driven warmth of Duolingo-style cartoon UI. The scoreboard metaphor draws the line — informational, broadcast-grade, sharp; never urgency-manipulative, never twee.
keyCharacteristics: Dark navy-black field (#050810) with translucent purple-tinted glass panels (rgba(18,14,38,0.32)), not flat dark grey.

Three illuminated accents in fixed roles: mint (#00FF88) = you / wins / primary CTA; cyan (#00D4FF) = live / info / secondary CTA; amber (#FBBF24) = leaders / crowns. Purple and pink are tertiary, never primary.
Tri-font system: Bricolage Grotesque (display, 800), Outfit (UI, 500), JetBrains Mono (scoreboard numerals, 900).
Glass-blur surfaces with inset top highlight — the panels feel lit from above, not flat.
Neon glow shadows reserved for moments of state (primary CTA, live indicator, 'you' row on leaderboard). Never decorative.
Motion timed in three steps: 140ms for snaps, 220ms for state changes, 400ms for entrances; eased with cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1).

rules.name: The Three-Channel Rule
rules.body: Cup Clash has exactly three accent roles: you/win = mint, live/info = cyan, leader = amber. Designers must not invent a fourth accent role. Purple, pink, and red are reserved for the specific surfaces named in §2. If a new screen seems to need a new color, the answer is to lean harder into one of the three.

rules.name: The Glass-Tinted-Purple Rule
rules.body: Glass panels carry a purple-tinted base (rgb(18,14,38) at 32% / 50% alpha), never flat grey. The purple tint is what separates this from generic dark UI. If a panel looks grey, the alpha is wrong or the tint was dropped.

rules.name: The Neon-Is-Earned Rule
rules.body: Glow shadows (shadow-neon-*, glow-ac, glow-cyan) appear on three things only: primary CTAs, the live-dot indicator, and the 'you' highlight. Glow on decorative elements reads as crypto-throwback.

rules.name: The Mono-For-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Any number that changes during the tournament — scores, points totals, ranks, countdowns, streaks, timers — must be JetBrains Mono at weight 900. Static numbers in body prose (e.g. '104 matches' in marketing copy) use the body font like normal. This is the rule that makes the scoreboard feel like a scoreboard.

rules.name: The Uppercase Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Every section is announced by a tiny uppercase label one step above the heading (label-caps, 11px, weight 700, tracking 0.18em, often in cyan). It anchors hierarchy without forcing a heavier H2.

rules.name: The Inset-Highlight Rule
rules.body: Every glass panel carries the inset top highlight (inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18)). It's the only thing keeping the panel from looking like a flat dark rectangle. Drop the inset, lose the lit-from-above effect, lose the whole illusion.

rules.name: The Glow-Only-On-State Rule
rules.body: Glow shadows appear only on (a) primary CTAs at rest and on hover, (b) the live-dot indicator, (c) the 'you' row on the leaderboard, (d) the active bottom-nav item. Never on decorative containers, never on inactive elements. Glow on a card-at-rest is the single fastest way to make the UI read as crypto-throwback.

rules.name: The No-Nested-Glass Rule
rules.body: Glass panels do not nest. A .glass inside another .glass reads as muddy; the blur compounds, the inset highlights stack, the transparency stops carrying depth. If you need a sub-region, use a tinted solid (bg-white/4, bg-ac/6) inside the glass instead.

dos: Do use the purple-tinted glass panel base (rgba(18,14,38,0.32)) for every surface that calls for elevation. The purple tint is the single token that separates Cup Clash from generic dark UI.
Do keep the inset top highlight (inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,0.18)) on every glass panel. Without it, the panel reads flat.
Do set every score, point total, rank, timer, and countdown in JetBrains Mono weight 900. This is the scoreboard contract.

Do reserve the mint→cyan gradient (linear-gradient(135deg, #00FF88, #00D4FF)) for the primary CTA only. It is the one strongest visual signal in the system; spread it across multiple elements and it stops being a signal.
Do use the LIVE pulse + cyan glass score bar to make matches feel like they're happening right now. This is what the dark theme is for.
Do pair color-coded state with an icon or label (crown for #1, dimmed avatar for eliminated, danger icon next to red). Green/red alone is not enough.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: reduce. The livePulse, floatY, score-flip, and slide-down animations all need a static fallback.
Do keep body prose to a 65–75ch line length on landing surfaces.
donts: Don't ship sportsbook patterns. No 'Lock in your pick' pressure copy, no countdown-to-deadline urgency animations, no odds-board layouts, no 'free $50 bet' carrots, no dark-pattern unsubscribe flows.
Don't ship the generic SaaS landing template: hero + three feature cards + pricing table + FAQ. Keep the bespoke phone-frame, glass countdown, FAQ accordion that the handoff designs around it.
Don't introduce mascots, cartoon UI, or 'Whoops! Better luck next time!' copy. Cup Clash is playful but adult.
Don't invent a fourth accent role. Three channels: mint (you/win), cyan (live/info), amber (leader). Purple/pink/red are reserved.
Don't nest glass inside glass. The blur compounds, the inset highlights stack, the transparency stops carrying depth.
Don't glow at rest on anything that isn't a primary CTA, the live-dot, the 'you' row, or the active bottom-nav item.
Don't use a colored left/right stripe greater than 1px as an accent on cards or list items. The 'you' leaderboard row's 2px mint left-border is the one sanctioned exception.
Don't use #000 or #fff raw. Use tinted near-blacks and translucent whites.
Don't use em-dashes or -- in copy. Use commas, colons, or periods.
Don't gate the first session. Guests explore the seeded demo dashboard freely.
Don't ship gradient-text on new surfaces. The legacy class is an anti-pattern; migrate to single-color emphasis when touched.
Don't ship third-party flag CDN calls or third-party fonts in production. Self-host before launch.
